data.body:
## Description

Modify `tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh` to add compact-on-close tests.

## File Impact
- Modify: `tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh`

## TDD Requirement (RED)
- `test_close_triggers_compaction`: Create ticket, add 12+ events (comments), close it via transition, verify a *-SNAPSHOT.json file exists in the ticket dir. Test approach: behavioral — create fixture, run close, check for SNAPSHOT file.
- `test_close_succeeds_if_compact_fails`: Set DSO_COMPACT_SCRIPT env var to a script that exits 1, close a ticket, verify exit 0. Test approach: behavioral — uses env var override (same pattern as DSO_UNBLOCK_SCRIPT) to inject compact failure, asserts close still succeeds.
- RED because ticket-transition.sh doesn't call compact yet and DSO_COMPACT_SCRIPT override doesn't exist.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file has new compact-on-close test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'test_close_triggers_compaction\|test_close_succeeds_if_compact_fails' tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 2)}'
- [ ] New tests fail (RED) because transition doesn't call compact yet
  Verify: bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-transition.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*compact'
